name: Anima Engine
short_description: Elevate your desktop with Anima Engine! Customize with animations, GIFs, images, videos, and audio in formats like MP4, WEBP, and more. Use AI tools to edit visuals, remove backgrounds, and create a style that's uniquely yours. The only limit is your imagination!
detailed_description:
Notes

Upcoming updates: Adding Anima Engine version 2.0, which is 58% faster than the current one. We want to take this opportunity to invite you to the Anima Discord, where you can stay informed about everything, report bugs, and share content. If you find any issues, don’t hesitate to let us know—we’ll fix them as quickly as possible. Together, we’ll grow as a community!


About the Software

Welcome to Anima Engine!!

Customize your desktop using animations, gifs, images, audios, and more by giving it your own style.

GIFS, MOF, WEBP, APNG, Sprite sheets, MP4, no matter the format.

Edit the images you want to use, use the new advances in artificial intelligence to remove backgrounds or colors, the only limit is your imagination.
about_the_game:
Welcome to Anima Engine!!

Customize your desktop using animations, gifs, images, audios, and more by giving it your own style.

GIFS, MOF, WEBP, APNG, Sprite sheets, MP4, no matter the format.

Edit the images you want to use, use the new advances in artificial intelligence to remove backgrounds or colors, the only limit is your imagination.
supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Bulgarian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, Finnish, Greek, Hungarian, Indonesian, Japanese, Korean, Norwegian, Polish, Romanian, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Swedish, Thai, Traditional Chinese
